name: Icejade Manifestation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヒ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>水</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ダイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ケン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>現</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゲン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control a WATER monster and your opponent has a monster on their field or GY: Take 1 "Icejade" monster from your Deck, and either send it to the GY or Special Summon it. If a face-up "Icejade" monster you control leaves the field by an opponent's card, except by being destroyed (and except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 card your opponent controls; banish it. You can only use each effect of "Icejade Manifestation" once per turn.
eff: If you control a WATER monster and your opponent has a monster on their field or GY: Take 1 "Icejade" monster from your Deck, and either send it to the GY or Special Summon it. If a face-up "Icejade" monster you control leaves the field by an opponent's card, except by being destroyed (and except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 card your opponent controls; banish it. You can only use each effect of "Icejade Manifestation" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Activates if other cards leave the field
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
